message:
test(ondisk,alloc): add overflow-cap edge-case tests for try_from conversions

Validate that groups_count() caps at u32::MAX (instead of truncating)
when blocks_count yields more groups than u32 can hold, and that
absolute_to_group_block() similarly caps the group index on huge block
numbers. Also fix formatting and const cast for MAX_EXTENT_COUNT.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
